text: The assistant applies traction on the colon, revealing the Douglas pouch. The surgeon identifies the vas deferens and seminal vesicles in the posterior plane and continues the dissection along the posterior aspect of the prostate.

The surgeon controls the vascular pedicles using either a vessel sealer or hemlock clips. Apical dissection is performed, and the urethral stump is managed based on the chosen type of urinary diversion.
